subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness that there is none other God but Him and that He Who hath appeared bearing the name of Ḥusayn before 'Alí is, verily, His Glory unto all who dwell therein [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و ان هذا الذی ظهر باسم حسین قبل علی لبهائه لمن فی
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @naming of children; of individuals, @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
